Package com.github.javaparser.resolution.declarations

Interface ResolvedValueDeclaration

All Superinterfaces:
ResolvedDeclaration
All Known Subinterfaces:
ResolvedAnnotationMemberDeclaration, ResolvedEnumConstantDeclaration, ResolvedFieldDeclaration, ResolvedParameterDeclaration, ResolvedPatternDeclaration
public interface ResolvedValueDeclaration extends ResolvedDeclaration
Declaration of a value.

Federico Tomassetti
